<!--
Update this file before publishing when you want branch-specific lead-in notes.
GitHub Actions prepends this Markdown above GitHub-generated release notes.
-->

## Highlights

This release includes the changes that were prepared for `1.0.11`; that version was not published.

- Cohere file transcription now uses shorter bounded chunks for more reliable long-file processing.
- Added AWS Bedrock (Mantle) as a built-in post-processing provider.
- File transcription cancellation now gives clearer feedback and handles cancellation more reliably.

---

**Notice:**
If the application crashes on an older CPU during transcription, use the Microsoft Store build when a matching Store release is available for this version.
